description: Unofficial Python SDK for the Pennylane API, the French accounting and invoicing platform. Complete Company API v2 and Firm API v1 coverage, sync and async, typed with Pydantic.
rules: Install with: pip install pennylane-sdk (import name: pennylane_sdk); the package is unrelated to the PennyLane quantum framework
Pass monetary amounts as Decimal or str, never float; response models expose them as Decimal
Iterating a list() result auto-paginates through every page under the built-in rate-limit throttle; do not write manual pagination loops or sleeps
Build filters with pennylane_sdk.filters helpers (filters.gte, filters.eq, filters.in_) passed as filter=[...]
Never wrap create calls in blind retry loops: the Pennylane API has no idempotency and the SDK already retries what is safe
Firm API methods (PennylaneFirm) take company_id as their first positional argument; Company API methods (Pennylane) do not
Ledger entry lines require BOTH debit and credit on every line, with the unused side set to "0.00"
Every exception derives from pennylane_sdk.PennylaneError; catch AuthenticationError, ValidationError, RateLimitError for specific handling
